Class AnalyticsControllerImpl

java.lang.Object
com.wealthpro.analytics.controller.AnalyticsControllerImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AnalyticsController
@RestController @RequestMapping("api") public class AnalyticsControllerImpl extends Object implements AnalyticsController
REST controller implementation for AnalyticsController. Delegates all business logic to AnalyticsService.
Version:
2.0
Author:
WealthPro Team
